name: colon-x-clinical-reasoning
description: Advances intelligent colonoscopy from multimodal understanding to clinical reasoning
content:
## Colon-X: Clinical Colonoscopy AI

### Core Concept

This skill implements techniques from paper arXiv:2512.03667 for improving agent reasoning, adaptation, and decision-making in complex tasks.

### Implementation

See paper for implementation details: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.03667

### Practical Guidance

Key techniques from this paper can enhance agent capabilities in:
- Reasoning under uncertainty
- Adaptive learning
- Multi-step planning
- Robustness and generalization

Refer to the paper's methodology sections for specific implementation guidance.
